build.beforeDevCommand: sh src-tauri/scripts/build-belay.sh debug && (cd ../web && { [ -d node_modules ] || npm ci; }) && npm --prefix ../web run dev
build.beforeBuildCommand: sh src-tauri/scripts/build-belay.sh release && (cd ../web && { [ -d node_modules ] || npm ci; }) && npm --prefix ../web run build
